text.hero-title:
A Better Life Starts with a
Beautiful Smile
text.hero-subtitle: Welcome to Clinique Dentaire D'Urgence et Familiale Angus-Maisonneuve — where personalized dental care meets genuine compassion. Open 7 days a week.
text.emergency-title: Dental Emergency? We're Here for You
text.emergency-subtitle: Open 7 days a week · Including weekends · Serving Greater Montreal
text.about-text-1: Welcome to Clinique Dentaire D'Urgence et Familiale Angus-Maisonneuve. We are proud to provide personalized care tailored to your unique needs. We want to understand and maintain your oral health through listening and a truly client-centered approach.
text.about-text-2: Our clinic's reputation is built on the commitment of our team members — properly informing patients and ensuring every step of the treatment plan is clearly understood. You will receive outstanding care throughout your treatment.
text.about-val-1-text: Every treatment plan is explained clearly and customized to your unique needs and concerns.
text.about-val-2-text: Proactive measures ensure patients and staff have a safe and hygienic environment for all dental needs.
text.about-val-3-text: We are available when you need us most — including weekends and emergency situations.
text.promise-text: At Clinique Dentaire D'Urgence et Familiale Angus-Maisonneuve, we've taken proactive steps to ensure patients and staff have a safe, clean environment. Dental pain prevents you from enjoying life — don't delay it further. We're open 7 days a week to help.
text.hours-subtitle: We are open 7 days a week — making us one of the most accessible dental offices across Greater Montreal.
text.feature-bio-1: Dr. Jitesh Patel has been working as a general dentist since graduating from McGill University in 2015. In addition to owning his own dental clinic, he practices mobile geriatric dentistry at various nursing homes around Montreal.
text.feature-bio-2: He also works as a clinical instructor for the Faculty of Dentistry at McGill's Oral Diagnostic Clinic and the Community Outreach Program, where he supervises dental students.
text.feature-bio-3: Before practicing dentistry, Dr. Patel worked as an engineer for 17 years for Ericsson Canada Inc. After completing a Masters in Teaching Mathematics at Concordia University in 2008, he found his true calling — making a genuine difference in people's lives through oral health care.
text.footer-desc: Providing personalized, compassionate dental care to the Montreal community. Open 7 days a week.
text.footer-copy: © 2026 Clinique Dentaire d'Urgence et Familiale Angus-Maisonneuve. All rights reserved.
text.services-subtitle: We cover all your dental needs — from emergency care to aesthetic transformations.

services.title: Cosmetic Dentistry
services.description: Special care is taken to create natural and beautiful smiles. We combine artistry with the latest dental techniques.

services.title: Exams & Cleaning
services.description: We treat our patients with care, listen to their concerns, and perform thorough examinations with modern diagnostic tools.

services.title: Emergencies
services.description: We are available by phone and prioritize next-day emergency appointments. Dental pain should not wait.

services.title: Fillings & Crowns
services.description: When a cavity forms, it needs to be restored. We offer a full range of filling and crown options.

services.title: Root Canal Treatments
services.description: When a tooth's pulp is infected or inflamed, root canal treatment can save the tooth and relieve pain.

services.title: Implants & Crowns
services.description: Dental implants are the best permanent solution for replacing a missing tooth. They look and function like natural teeth.

services.title: TMD / Jaw Pain
services.description: Does your jaw lock? Do you hear clicking sounds? Do you wake up with jaw pain or headaches?

services.title: Dentures
services.description: We create custom natural-looking dentures that restore both the appearance and function of your smile.

services.title: Surgery & Grafts
services.description: We offer comprehensive surgical procedures and stay up-to-date with the latest research and techniques.

services.title: Pediatric Dentistry
services.description: We love kids! We focus on making every dental visit comfortable and fun for children of all ages.

testimonials.text: "Dr. Patel gave me great service as well as important information on my teeth. Looking forward to my next visit."
testimonials.author: S O

testimonials.text: "Dr. Patel is really kind and good. They accept emergency needs — I got my tooth removed and added a denture. The quality of work is great."
testimonials.author: A S

testimonials.text: "Fantastic service — from the receptionist to the dentist and denturologist. For anyone who is afraid of dentists, highly recommended. Incredible service! Friendly and professional — 5 stars!"
testimonials.author: M L

testimonials.text: "Excellent dentist, very patient with me being nervous. They had a same-day appointment for me without any trouble."
testimonials.author: J R

testimonials.text: "Incredible service, very kind staff and a really nice atmosphere. Ignore the bad reviews — the establishment was owned by a different owner. Excellent place."
testimonials.author: P T
